definitions.text: brukt som samtykkende eller bekreftende svarord
definitions.translation: used as an affirmative or confirming response

examples.en: are you coming? Yes
yes please
Ola! Yes, here I am

examples.no: er du helt frisk? Ja da
examples.en: are you completely well? Yes indeed

definitions.text: brukt ved bekreftelse på noe en selv sier
definitions.translation: used to confirm something one is saying oneself

examples.en: a lie, yes that is the word

examples.no: ja, så menn skal vi det
examples.en: yes, by all means we shall
victories, yes we shall have them!

definitions.text: brukt sist i setning for å understreke et utsagn
definitions.translation: used at the end of a sentence to emphasize a statement

examples.en: right, yes!

examples.no: var det du som gjorde det? Det var jeg, ja
examples.en: was it you who did it? It was me, yes
now things are going well, yes
yes, who knows
yes, did you really have to?

examples.no: ja, nei, sannelig om jeg vet
examples.en: yes, no, honestly if I know

definitions.text: brukt når en (utålmodig) innrømmer noe eller går med på noe
definitions.translation: used when one (impatiently) admits or agrees to something

examples.no: ja da, ja da, som du vil
examples.en: yes indeed, yes indeed, as you wish
well yes, all right then

definitions.text: brukt når en konstaterer noe som en bare må finne seg i
definitions.translation: used when one accepts something one has to put up with

examples.no: ja ja, så får vi vel gå, da
examples.en: yes yes, then I suppose we'll have to go

definitions.text: brukt for å innlede og framheve et utsagn
definitions.translation: used to introduce and emphasize a statement

examples.no: ja, du er meg en fin fyr
examples.en: yes, you're a fine fellow
yes, just you try

examples.no: ja, du er nå lik deg selv
examples.en: yes, you're just like yourself
yes, this was big news

definitions.text: brukt for å uttrykke at en avslutter noe
definitions.translation: used to express that one is finishing something

examples.en: yes, that was that

examples.no: ja, så får du ha det, da
examples.en: yes, take care then

definitions.text: brukt for å uttrykke at en fastslår eller fastholder noe
definitions.translation: used to express that one is stating or maintaining something

examples.no: ja, nå skal det bli godt med mat
examples.en: yes, now there will be some good food

examples.no: denne rampen, ja, jeg kaller dem ramp
examples.en: this rascal, yes, I call them rascals
yes, we love this country

definitions.text: brukt for å konstatere en kjensgjerning

examples.no: ja, bare skjenn; det gjør ikke meg noe
examples.en: yes, just scold; it does not bother me

examples.no: akk ja, vi begynner å bli gamle
examples.en: ah yes, we are starting to get old

definitions.text: brukt mellom to ledd for å angi en stigning i uttrykket
definitions.translation: used between two clauses to indicate an increase in intensity

examples.no: hun var rolig, ja helt avslappet
examples.en: she was calm, yes completely relaxed
he was angry, yes furious
